name: Pork-Oyster Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Make a dark brown roux with the oil and flour.
2. In a large skillet, brown the beef and pork.
3. Add the onions, celery, bell pepper, garlic, green onions, and parsley; cook until vegetables are soft.
4. Drain off any excess oil.
5. Combine the roux with the meat-vegetable mixture. If needed, add some of the oyster liquid to achieve a thick consistency.
6. Add the oysters (chopped if desired) and season with salt and cayenne pepper.
7. Place the mixture in one 9-inch pie shell.
8. Top with another 9-inch pie shell and crimp the edges.
9. Make several slashes in the top of the pie shell.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for 35 to 45 minutes, or until the pie shell is golden brown.
